SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF EXAMINATION CALENDAR
Off Calendar Sep-09-2021 Off Calendar

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-10-2021 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff/Respondent Panfilo Armas appeared.
George Wynns, Esq., appeared on behalf of Defendant/Appellant Ok Soon Key, also present.
This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. Parties sworn.
Plaintiff/Respondent Panfilo Armas testified on his own behalf.
George Wynns, Esq., testified on behalf of Defendant/Appellant Ok Soon Key.
Defendant/Appellant Ok Soon Key also testified on her own behalf.
The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Plaintiff/Respondent Group Exhibit - Documents re: contractors
Defendant/Appellant Group Exhibit - Documents re: contractors; photos; roofing document
Plaintiff's and Defendant's exhibits retained by the Court. Defendant's photos returned to defendant.
The matter is taken under submission.
Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Not reported. (306)
